question: What speed is my new internet plan?

retrieval_results.context:
User upgraded their internet connection to 500 Mbps around December 28, 2025, and reports that this upgrade has significantly improved their Netflix streaming experience.
User owns a Western Digital 2 TB external hard drive, has been using it to back up all important files, photos, and videos, feels a great sense of peace of mind from this backup, and is also thinking about organizing computer files and ensuring proper backup practices.
User is experiencing laptop battery life issues, has tried various tips to extend battery life, is seeking the best way to check if the battery is still in good condition, is considering replacing the battery due to age, and wants advice on how to properly dispose of the old battery.
